name: Nutty Apricot Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover apricots with water, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup liquid.
2. Coarsely chop the apricots and set aside.
3. In a saucepan, combine the reserved apricot liquid and 3/4 cup sugar. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the chopped apricots.
5. Cream the butter; gradually add 1 cup sugar, beating at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
6. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add the floured mixture to the creamed mixture, mixing well (mixture will be crumbly).
7. Stir in coconut and pecans.
8. Pat about three-fourths of the coconut mixture into an ungreased 13x9x2 inch pan.
9. Spread the apricot mixture evenly over the crust, spreading within 1/4 inch from the edge of the pan.
10. Sprinkle with the remaining coconut mixture.
11. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Let cool in the pan; chill.
12. Cut into bars. Yield: about 4 dozen.
